predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced recommendations are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; rank one remains the backward-compatible BEST_AVAILABLE field and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Paraguay lost 4-1 to the USA and beat Turkiye 1-0. Australia beat Turkiye 2-0 and lost 2-0 to the USA. Australia described Paraguay as unpredictable, aggressive and physically demanding ahead of a match likely to decide second place.
research.injuries_suspensions: Paraguay: Miguel Almiron is suspended after a red card against Turkiye. Julio Enciso suffered an injury before the tournament; an early report suggested a possible return for the Australia match, but his availability remained unconfirmed by the cutoff. Australia: match-specific confirmed injuries or suspensions were unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: Paraguay must replace Almiron; Enciso's potential return cannot be assumed. Australia are likely to retain Tony Popovic's aggressive 3-4-2-1 framework with Jackson Irvine and Aiden O'Neill central, Harry Souttar in defence and Nestory Irankunda/Mohamed Toure among the attacking options; no confirmed XI was available.
research.motivation_group_state: Group D: Australia 3 pts, GD 0; Paraguay 3 pts, GD -2. The winner reaches six points and secures advancement. A draw leaves both on four and sends second place/two best-third-place prospects to goal difference and the Turkiye-USA result.
research.weather_venue_notes: San Francisco Bay Area Stadium is the open-air Levi's Stadium in Santa Clara. A reliable match-time forecast for the 18:00 local kickoff on June 25 was unavailable by the cutoff.

predictions.venue: Los Angeles Stadium, Inglewood, California, USA

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Turkiye win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 22.1% means roughly 22 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Turquía
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 22.1% significa aproximadamente 22 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 29.5% means roughly 30 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 29.5% significa aproximadamente 30 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: USA win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.3% means roughly 48 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Estados Unidos
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.3% significa aproximadamente 48 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Turkiye
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.91 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Turquía
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.91 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: USA
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.65 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Estados Unidos
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.65 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 47.1% is the model probability; 2.12 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 47.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.12 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 52.9% is the model probability; 1.89 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 52.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.89 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.3% is the model probability; 2.07 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.3% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.07 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 51.7% is the model probability; 1.93 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 51.7% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Turkiye -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 20.8% is the model win probability; 4.81 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Turquía -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 20.8% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 4.81 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

research.team_news: Turkiye lost 2-0 to Australia and 1-0 to Paraguay. The USA beat Paraguay 4-1 and Australia 2-0 to clinch knockout-stage qualification. Without Christian Pulisic against Australia, Mauricio Pochettino used Ricardo Pepi alongside Folarin Balogun in a successful two-striker setup.
research.injuries_suspensions: USA: Christian Pulisic missed the Australia match with a left-calf injury; his recovery was progressing, but availability for Turkiye was not confirmed by the cutoff. Turkiye: match-specific confirmed injuries or suspensions were unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: The USA could retain Pepi-Balogun, revert to a one-striker system, or rotate because qualification is secured; Pulisic's status is the main selection variable. Turkiye's expected creative core includes Arda Guler, Kenan Yildiz and Hakan Calhanoglu in a fluid 4-2-3-1, but no confirmed XI was available.
research.motivation_group_state: Group D: USA 6 pts, GD +5 and are qualified; a draw secures first. Turkiye 0 pts, GD -3 must beat the USA to reach three points and also need a loser in Paraguay-Australia plus favorable goal-difference and best-third-place comparisons.
research.weather_venue_notes: Los Angeles Stadium is SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, covered by a fixed translucent roof but open at the sides. Direct rain is limited, though temperature/airflow can still matter. A reliable match-time forecast was unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

research.team_news: Norway opened with a 4-1 win over Iraq, led by two Erling Haaland goals and a Leo Ostigard goal; France beat Senegal 3-1, with Kylian Mbappe scoring twice. Their June 22 second matches had not been played by the June 21 cutoff, so later form and team news were unavailable.
research.injuries_suspensions: No match-specific confirmed Norway or France injury absence was found by the cutoff. France defender William Saliba was reported to be managing persistent niggles while continuing to play; his June 26 availability was unavailable. Confirmed suspensions: unavailable because the June 22 matches could still create them.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed XI was available. Norway's established attacking structure centers on Haaland with Martin Odegaard supplying chances; Ostigard had started and scored against Iraq. France's opening-match attack was led by Mbappe, while Bradley Barcola was a plausible option after scoring as a substitute; changes after the intervening June 22 match were unknowable at the cutoff.
research.motivation_group_state: Group I as of June 21: Norway 3 pts, GD +3; France 3 pts, GD +2; Senegal 0, Iraq 0. Both teams still had June 22 matches, so the exact qualification requirement and rotation incentive for this final fixture were unavailable. The match was positioned to have first-place significance, but that was not yet guaranteed.
research.weather_venue_notes: Boston Stadium is the open-air Gillette Stadium in Foxborough, with a 15:00 local kickoff. Late-June heat or storms are possible, but a reliable match-time forecast for June 26 and any heat-protocol decision were unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.0% is the model probability; 2.08 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.0% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals

en: Open Betano, then Sports → Football → World Cup.
Search for Senegal vs Iraq and confirm the kickoff date shown on this card.
Open the market named “Match Result”.
Choose exactly “Senegal”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.
Check the current decimal price. The saved screenshot price is 1.31; the model fair-price threshold is 1.43.
Treat rank one as the primary comparison, not a mandatory bet. Recheck the selection, line, 90-minute settlement, current price, and team news before deciding.
es: Abre Betano y entra a Deportes → Fútbol → Mundial.
Busca Senegal vs Irak y confirma la fecha de inicio mostrada en esta tarjeta.
Abre el mercado llamado “Resultado del partido”.
Elige exactamente “Senegal”. No sustituyas por una línea de hándicap o total parecida.
Revisa la cuota decimal actual. La cuota guardada en la captura es 1.31; el umbral de cuota justa del modelo es 1.43.
Trata el rango uno como la comparación principal, no como apuesta obligatoria. Revisa selección, línea, liquidación a 90 minutos, cuota actual y noticias antes de decidir.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced recommendations are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; rank one remains the backward-compatible BEST_AVAILABLE field and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Senegal lost 3-1 to France in their opener. Iraq lost 4-1 to Norway after equalizing and producing a spell of pressure before Norway pulled away. Their June 22 second matches had not been played by the cutoff; reliable later team news was unavailable.
research.injuries_suspensions: Match-specific confirmed injuries for Senegal or Iraq were unavailable. Confirmed suspensions were also unavailable because cards or dismissals in the intervening June 22 matches could affect June 26.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed XI was available. Senegal changes after the France defeat were unavailable. Iraq's opener showed they could press and create against Norway, but the goalkeeper error that restored Norway's lead and subsequent defensive concessions could prompt changes; personnel and formation were unconfirmed.
research.motivation_group_state: Group I as of June 21: Senegal 0 pts, GD -2; Iraq 0 pts, GD -3. Both still had June 22 matches, so the exact final-round qualification state was unavailable. At the cutoff both needed points in match two to avoid arriving in Toronto near elimination; June 26 could still decide second or a best-third-place route.
research.weather_venue_notes: Toronto Stadium is the expanded, open-air BMO Field, with a 15:00 local kickoff. A reliable match-time forecast for June 26 was unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.number_meaning: 15.5% means roughly 15 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced recommendations are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; rank one remains the backward-compatible BEST_AVAILABLE field and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Reliable post-opening-match updates were unavailable by the June 21 research cutoff.
research.injuries_suspensions: Unavailable by the June 21 cutoff; later match reports were excluded.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed lineup was available by the June 21 cutoff.
research.motivation_group_state: Final-round qualification state depended on intervening matches and was unavailable by the cutoff.
research.weather_venue_notes: Venue is documented in the canonical fixture file; reliable match-time weather was unavailable.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Cape Verde win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 36.3% means roughly 36 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Cabo Verde
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 36.3% significa aproximadamente 36 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 33.0% means roughly 33 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 33.0% significa aproximadamente 33 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Saudi Arabia win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 30.7% means roughly 31 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Arabia Saudita
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 30.7% significa aproximadamente 31 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Cape Verde
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.34 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Cabo Verde
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.34 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Saudi Arabia
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.17 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Arabia Saudita
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.17 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 45.9% is the model probability; 2.18 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 45.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.18 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 54.1% is the model probability; 1.85 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 54.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.85 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.0% is the model probability; 1.96 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.0% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.96 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 49.0% is the model probability; 2.04 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 49.0% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.04 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Cape Verde -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 40.5% is the model win probability; 2.47 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Cabo Verde -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 40.5% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 2.47 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Egypt win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 34.9% means roughly 35 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Egipto
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 34.9% significa aproximadamente 35 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 33.4% means roughly 33 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 33.4% significa aproximadamente 33 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Iran win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 31.7% means roughly 32 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Irán
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 31.7% significa aproximadamente 32 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Egypt
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.30 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Egipto
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.30 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Iran
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.21 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Irán
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.21 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 45.8% is the model probability; 2.18 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 45.8% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.18 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 54.2% is the model probability; 1.84 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 54.2% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.84 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.0% is the model probability; 1.96 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.0% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.96 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 49.0% is the model probability; 2.04 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 49.0% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.04 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Egypt -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 38.8% is the model win probability; 2.58 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Egipto -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 38.8% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 2.58 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

en: Small, shifted historical holdout.
Screenshot price and team information can move before kickoff.
Historical profitability is not validated.
es: Holdout histórico pequeño y con cambio de régimen.
La cuota y la información de equipos pueden cambiar antes del inicio.
La rentabilidad histórica no está validada.

why_ranked.en: Ranked by conservative expected-value utility after market disagreement and family-risk penalties.
why_ranked.es: Clasificada por utilidad conservadora de valor esperado tras penalizar desacuerdo de mercado y riesgo del mercado.

en: Open Betano, then Sports → Football → World Cup.
Search for Egypt vs Iran and confirm the kickoff date shown on this card.
Open the market named “Match Result”.
Choose exactly “Irán”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.
Check the current decimal price. The saved screenshot price is 3.80; the model fair-price threshold is 3.64.
Treat rank one as the primary comparison, not a mandatory bet. Recheck the selection, line, 90-minute settlement, current price, and team news before deciding.
es: Abre Betano y entra a Deportes → Fútbol → Mundial.
Busca Egipto vs Irán y confirma la fecha de inicio mostrada en esta tarjeta.
Abre el mercado llamado “Resultado del partido”.
Elige exactamente “Irán”. No sustituyas por una línea de hándicap o total parecida.
Revisa la cuota decimal actual. La cuota guardada en la captura es 3.80; el umbral de cuota justa del modelo es 3.64.
Trata el rango uno como la comparación principal, no como apuesta obligatoria. Revisa selección, línea, liquidación a 90 minutos, cuota actual y noticias antes de decidir.

en: Open Betano, then Sports → Football → World Cup.

Open the market named “Match Result”.
Choose exactly “Irán”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.
Check the current decimal price. The saved screenshot price is 3.80; the model fair-price threshold is 3.64.
Enter S/8.00 only for this budget simulation, review the bet slip, and confirm the selection, line, 90-minute settlement, and possible gross return before any real action.

Ingresa S/8.00 solo para esta simulación de presupuesto, revisa el cupón y confirma selección, línea, liquidación a 90 minutos y retorno bruto posible antes de cualquier acción real.

warning.es: Esta simulación de cobertura forzada usa todo el presupuesto incluso cuando el EV o EV estresado es negativo. No es un sistema de apuestas con rentabilidad validada.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced recommendations are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; rank one remains the backward-compatible BEST_AVAILABLE field and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Reliable post-opening-match updates were unavailable by the June 21 research cutoff.
research.injuries_suspensions: Unavailable by the June 21 cutoff; later match reports were excluded.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed lineup was available by the June 21 cutoff.
research.motivation_group_state: Final-round qualification state depended on intervening matches and was unavailable by the cutoff.
research.weather_venue_notes: Venue is documented in the canonical fixture file; reliable match-time weather was unavailable.

en.number_meaning: 11.2% is the model win probability; 8.90 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Nueva Zelanda -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 11.2% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 8.90 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

en: Small, shifted historical holdout.
Screenshot price and team information can move before kickoff.
Historical profitability is not validated.
es: Holdout histórico pequeño y con cambio de régimen.
La cuota y la información de equipos pueden cambiar antes del inicio.
La rentabilidad histórica no está validada.

why_ranked.en: Ranked by conservative expected-value utility after market disagreement and family-risk penalties.
why_ranked.es: Clasificada por utilidad conservadora de valor esperado tras penalizar desacuerdo de mercado y riesgo del mercado.

en: Open Betano, then Sports → Football → World Cup.
Search for New Zealand vs Belgium and confirm the kickoff date shown on this card.
Open the market named “Match Result”.
Choose exactly “Bélgica”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.
Check the current decimal price. The saved screenshot price is 1.23; the model fair-price threshold is 1.35.
Treat rank one as the primary comparison, not a mandatory bet. Recheck the selection, line, 90-minute settlement, current price, and team news before deciding.
es: Abre Betano y entra a Deportes → Fútbol → Mundial.
Busca Nueva Zelanda vs Bélgica y confirma la fecha de inicio mostrada en esta tarjeta.
Abre el mercado llamado “Resultado del partido”.
Elige exactamente “Bélgica”. No sustituyas por una línea de hándicap o total parecida.
Revisa la cuota decimal actual. La cuota guardada en la captura es 1.23; el umbral de cuota justa del modelo es 1.35.
Trata el rango uno como la comparación principal, no como apuesta obligatoria. Revisa selección, línea, liquidación a 90 minutos, cuota actual y noticias antes de decidir.

en: Open Betano, then Sports → Football → World Cup.

Enter S/2.40 only for this budget simulation, review the bet slip, and confirm the selection, line, 90-minute settlement, and possible gross return before any real action.

Ingresa S/2.40 solo para esta simulación de presupuesto, revisa el cupón y confirma selección, línea, liquidación a 90 minutos y retorno bruto posible antes de cualquier acción real.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced recommendations are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; rank one remains the backward-compatible BEST_AVAILABLE field and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Reliable post-opening-match updates were unavailable by the June 21 research cutoff.
research.injuries_suspensions: Unavailable by the June 21 cutoff; later match reports were excluded.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed lineup was available by the June 21 cutoff.
research.motivation_group_state: Final-round qualification state depended on intervening matches and was unavailable by the cutoff.
research.weather_venue_notes: Venue is documented in the canonical fixture file; reliable match-time weather was unavailable.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Croatia win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 40.0% means roughly 40 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Croacia
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 40.0% significa aproximadamente 40 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 31.9% means roughly 32 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 31.9% significa aproximadamente 32 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Ghana win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 28.1% means roughly 28 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Ghana
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 28.1% significa aproximadamente 28 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Croatia
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.44 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Croacia
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.44 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Ghana
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.09 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Ghana
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.09 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 46.3% is the model probability; 2.16 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 46.3% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.16 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 53.7% is the model probability; 1.86 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 53.7% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.86 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 50.6% is the model probability; 1.98 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 50.6% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.98 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 49.4% is the model probability; 2.02 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 49.4% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.02 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Croatia lost 4-2 to England in their opener; Ghana beat Panama 1-0. Both had an intervening June 23 match after the cutoff, so form, cards and lineup developments entering June 27 were unavailable.
research.injuries_suspensions: Croatia: no match-specific confirmed injury or suspension was found by the cutoff. Ghana: Thomas Partey missed the Canada-based opener because he was denied entry but was reported eligible for the June 23 match in the United States; his June 27 status was not a fitness issue but remained unavailable after the intervening game. Other injuries/suspensions: unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed XI was available. Croatia could retain its veteran midfield while addressing defensive problems exposed by England, but specific changes were unavailable. Ghana's Partey could become a midfield option in the United States; selection after the June 23 England match was unknowable at the cutoff.
research.motivation_group_state: Group L as of June 21: Ghana 3 pts, GD +1; Croatia 0 pts, GD -2. Ghana still had England and Croatia still had Panama on June 23, so the exact final-round qualification state was unavailable. This fixture could decide a top-two or best-third-place berth, but no precise points requirement was knowable.
research.weather_venue_notes: Philadelphia Stadium is the open-air Lincoln Financial Field, with a 17:00 local kickoff. Late-June heat and thunderstorms can matter; a reliable match-time forecast was unavailable by the cutoff.

predictions.venue: New York New Jersey Stadium, East Rutherford, New Jersey, USA

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Panama win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 7.5% means roughly 8 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Panamá
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 7.5% significa aproximadamente 8 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 24.4% means roughly 24 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 24.4% significa aproximadamente 24 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: England win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 68.1% means roughly 68 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Inglaterra
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 68.1% significa aproximadamente 68 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Panama
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.55 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Panamá
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.55 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: England
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 2.12 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Inglaterra
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 2.12 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 49.7% is the model probability; 2.01 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 49.7% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.01 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 50.3% is the model probability; 1.99 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 50.3% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.99 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 37.0% is the model probability; 2.70 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 37.0% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.70 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 63.0% is the model probability; 1.59 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 63.0% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.59 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Panama -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 8.3% is the model win probability; 12.07 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Panamá -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 8.3% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 12.07 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

research.team_news: Panama lost 1-0 to Ghana in their opener. England beat Croatia 4-2, with Harry Kane scoring twice. Their June 23 second matches had not occurred by the cutoff, so final-round team news was unavailable.
research.injuries_suspensions: England: Tino Livramento was ruled out of the tournament with a calf injury and replaced by Trevoh Chalobah. Bukayo Saka was managing an Achilles issue; Declan Rice said he was fit despite neural pain in his upper hamstring/lower back; Marcus Rashford had returned to training after a minor muscular issue. Panama injuries were unavailable. Suspensions for June 27 were unavailable because of the June 23 matches.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: England's right side was expected to feature Noni Madueke with Saka's minutes managed, while Rice was available and Kane was the central striker; rotation for the third match could not be assessed before June 23. Choose exactly “Draw”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Colombia beat Uzbekistan 3-1 in their opener; Portugal drew 1-1 with Congo DR. Colombia midfielder Juan Camilo Portilla suffered a family bereavement during camp, but the cited report did not say he left camp or was unavailable. Both teams had June 23 matches after the cutoff.
research.injuries_suspensions: No match-specific confirmed injury or suspension for Colombia or Portugal was found by the cutoff. Portilla's bereavement is team news, not an injury, and his availability was unavailable. June 23 cards could create June 27 suspensions, so final suspension status was unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed XI was available. Colombia's primary attacking creators were Luis Diaz and James Rodriguez. Portugal's key selection question remained how Cristiano Ronaldo fit with Bruno Fernandes and a tactically flexible back-three/back-four structure. Changes after June 23 were unknowable.
research.motivation_group_state: Group K as of June 21: Colombia 3 pts, GD +2; Portugal 1 pt, GD 0. Colombia still had Congo DR and Portugal had Uzbekistan on June 23, so the exact first-place, qualification and rotation implications for June 27 were unavailable.
research.weather_venue_notes: Miami Stadium is the open-air Hard Rock Stadium in Miami Gardens, with a 19:30 local kickoff. Heat, humidity and thunderstorms are material risks; a reliable match-time forecast was unavailable by the cutoff.

en: Open Betsson, then Sports → Football → World Cup.
Search for Congo DR vs Uzbekistan and confirm the kickoff date shown on this card.
Open the market named “Match Result”.
Choose exactly “Draw”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.
Check the current decimal price. The saved screenshot price is 3.50; the model fair-price threshold is 3.36.
Treat rank one as the primary comparison, not a mandatory bet. Recheck the selection, line, 90-minute settlement, current price, and team news before deciding.
es: Abre Betsson y entra a Deportes → Fútbol → Mundial.
Busca RD Congo vs Uzbekistán y confirma la fecha de inicio mostrada en esta tarjeta.
Abre el mercado llamado “Resultado del partido”.
Elige exactamente “Draw”. No sustituyas por una línea de hándicap o total parecida.
Revisa la cuota decimal actual. La cuota guardada en la captura es 3.50; el umbral de cuota justa del modelo es 3.36.
Trata el rango uno como la comparación principal, no como apuesta obligatoria. Revisa selección, línea, liquidación a 90 minutos, cuota actual y noticias antes de decidir.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced recommendations are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; rank one remains the backward-compatible BEST_AVAILABLE field and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Congo DR drew 1-1 with Portugal in their opener; Uzbekistan lost 3-1 to Colombia in their first World Cup match. Both had intervening June 23 matches after the cutoff, so current final-round form and team news were unavailable.
research.injuries_suspensions: No match-specific confirmed injury or suspension for Congo DR or Uzbekistan was found by the cutoff. June 23 cards could create June 27 suspensions; final suspension status was unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed XI was available. Pre-tournament analysis identified Yoane Wissa as Congo DR's key forward. Uzbekistan were expected to retain a compact, defence-first structure featuring Abdukodir Khusanov, but changes after the Colombia loss and June 23 match were unavailable.
research.motivation_group_state: Group K as of June 21: Congo DR 1 pt, GD 0; Uzbekistan 0 pts, GD -2. Both still had June 23 matches, so the exact June 27 qualification requirement was unavailable. The match could decide second place or a best-third-place route.
research.weather_venue_notes: Atlanta Stadium is Mercedes-Benz Stadium, a retractable-roof, climate-controlled venue, with a 22:00 local kickoff. Roof status and a reliable external forecast were unavailable; a closed roof would limit direct heat and storm exposure.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Expected goals: Jordan
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.52 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.
